response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including a notable background in C/C++ (e.g., National Instruments role) and high-performance systems. However, his recent work heavily emphasizes full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript (Node.js, React) and other languages (D, Java), with limited direct exposure to C++ in the last 8+ years. His lack of recent C++ cloud/industrial automation experience and minimal mention of secure development lifecycle practices raise concerns for the role's core requirements.
strengths: Strong C/C++ foundation with hands-on experience (e.g., National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI)
Proven track record in high-performance, low-latency systems (e.g., Dunnhumby micro-services, real-time apps)
Extensive full-stack and dev-ops expertise, with agile methodologies (TDD, CI/CD) and mentorship experience
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last substantial role was ~9 years ago; recent roles focus on other stacks)
No explicit mention of IEC 62443 or industrial cybersecurity standards in resume
Lacks direct experience with industrial automation protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA) or cloud platforms like Azure
